data.title: PI Rallies 30% On Kraken Listing Before Pi Day: What Is Going On?
data.description: Pi Network (CRYPTO: PI) experienced a notable 30% surge in its value during trading hours in Asia on Friday following the announcement from Kraken that they would be listing the cryptocurrency before Pi Day on March 14. This listing on Kraken, a significant U.S.-regulated exchange, acted as a catalyst for the rally. PI was already listed on platforms like OKX, Gate, and Bitget, but the addition of Kraken expands its accessibility to both mainstream retail and institutional traders. The decision to coincide this event with Pi Day, a celebration of the mathematical constant where the first three digits are 3.14, was seen as a strategic marketing move for Pi Network. Pi Network distinguishes itself as a mobile-first cryptocurrency project that utilizes a phone-based trust graph instead of traditional proof-of-work mining methods. Users engage with a mobile app daily to earn tokens and establish identity-verified security circles that contribute to a consensus system based on the Stellar protocol.

data.title: The ProLift Rigging Company Expands Northern Virginia Footprint with New Secure Industrial Storage Yard
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Manassas, Virginia, the ProLift Rigging Company revealed their launch of a fresh outdoor industrial storage yard in Northern Virginia. The renowned company, specializing in solutions-based industrial construction services for vital projects in North America, aims to enhance its operations with the new facility. This move signifies a significant development for ProLift Rigging, showcasing their commitment to expanding and optimizing their services for clients in the region.
